name: OSV Technical Evaluation for openEuler Distributions
description: Explore the OSV technical evaluation list for openEuler. Check certified OS vendors, versions, and download links with full compatibility and ecosystem testing results.

about.name: OSV Technical Evaluation
about.description: A technical evaluation program focusing on openEuler kernel and base packages, verifying that partner secondary distributions retain core ecosystem features and maintain key configurations. Evaluates L1/L2 package versions, packaging methods, interface consistency, KABI whitelisting, architecture features (ARM/X86), and performance optimization configurations.

name: OSV Technical Evaluation List for openEuler
description: A catalog of OS vendors (OSVs) that have completed technical evaluation for openEuler distributions, including certification status, OS versions, download links, evaluation dates, and compatibility testing results.
